Caroline's group meets regularly and plans events and campaigns to support LGBTQ rights and community.
Melanie and her kids recently went to the beach and had a great time.
Melanie's family goes to the beach once or twice a year.
Melanie's family has a summer tradition of going camping, where they roast marshmallows and tell stories around the campfire.
Melanie's best camping memory was seeing the Perseid meteor shower last year.
Melanie's youngest child took her first steps, which Melanie considers a special and meaningful moment.
Melanie feels thankful for life and her family, especially for the special moments they share.

fact_scores.text: Caroline and Melanie reconnected after a long time.
Caroline went biking with her gang and found it refreshing.
Melanie went camping with her kids and had a blast exploring the forest and hiking.
Caroline has been creating art since she was 17.
Melanie has been into art for seven years and now focuses on painting and pottery.
Caroline's art helps her express her feelings and explore her gender identity.
Caroline's transition and art journey affected her relationships, with some friends leaving and others staying supportive.
Caroline's painting represents her journey as a trans woman and her rejection of rigid binary thinking.

fact_scores.text: Caroline joined a new LGBTQ activist group called 'Connected LGBTQ Activists' last Tuesday.
Caroline's group meets regularly and plans events and campaigns to support LGBTQ rights and community.
Melanie and her kids recently went to the beach and had a great time.
Melanie's family goes to the beach once or twice a year.
Melanie's family has a summer tradition of going camping, where they roast marshmallows and tell stories around the campfire.
Melanie's best camping memory was seeing the Perseid meteor shower last year.
Melanie's youngest child took her first steps, which Melanie considers a special and meaningful moment.
Melanie feels thankful for life and her family, especially for the love and joy they bring.
